query: SELECT id, name, email, createdAt, onboardingLiberado, onboardingLiberadoEm, isActive FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%Hide%' OR name LIKE '%hide%' OR name LIKE '%Antonio%' OR name LIKE '%antonio%' OR name LIKE '%Cursino%' OR name LIKE '%cursino%' ORDER BY name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT id, name, email, createdAt, onboardingLiberado, onboardingLiberadoEm, isActive FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%Hide%' OR name LIKE '%hide%' OR name LIKE '%Antonio%' OR name LIKE '%antonio%' OR name LIKE '%Cursino%' OR name LIKE '%cursino%' ORDER BY name;
